testcase.name: API: reqres.in User CRUD Flow › POST /api/users → Create user, validate 201 and store userId @API
API: reqres.in User CRUD Flow › GET /api/users/{id} → Fetch created user and validate details @API
API: reqres.in User CRUD Flow › PUT /api/users/{id} → Update user name and validate @API
UI: DemoQA Book Store Flow › Full book store flow: login → search → log book → logout @UI
